title: 阿里组织架构调整：通义实验室升级为事业部 李飞飞出任阿里云 CTO
content: 阿里巴巴集团 CEO 吴泳铭发布内部信宣布 AI 相关组织调整，在集团层面设立技术委员会，由吴泳铭任组长，周靖人、吴泽明、李飞飞为成员。通义实验室升级为通义大模型事业部，由周靖人负责，李飞飞出任阿里云 CTO，吴泽明专注集团 CTO 工作，淘宝闪购 CEO 由雷雁群接任。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 阿里巴巴 集团 CEO 吴泳铭 发布内部信宣布 AI 相关组织调整，在集团层面设立技术委员会，由吴泳铭任组长，周靖人、 吴泽明 、 李飞飞 为成员。通义实验室升级为 通义大模型 事业部，由周靖人负责，李飞飞出任 阿里云 CTO，吴泽明专注集团 CTO 工作， 淘宝闪购 CEO 由雷雁群接任。 2026-04-08 阿里组织架构调整：通义实验室升级为事业部 李飞飞出任阿里云 CTO 2026-03-25 阿里巴巴蔡崇信：CEO 岗位永远安全，智能体不会取代 CEO 2026-03-19 阿里吴泳铭：ATH 事业群优先打造智能能力最强的模型 2026-03-16 阿里成立 Token Hub 事业群，由 CEO 吴泳铭直接负责 2026-03-05 阿里批准千问技术负责人林俊旸辞职，将成立基础模型支持小组 2026-03-05 林俊旸提出离职后，阿里高管紧急答疑 2025-12-10 阿里云 CTO、通义实验室负责人周靖人成为阿里合伙人 2025-11-25 阿里电话会披露 AI 战略进展：B 端 C 端齐发力 2025-11-07 吴泳铭：阿里巴巴正在建设超大规模 AI 基础设施 2025-10-21 吴泳铭：阿里巴巴愿为技术变革全力以赴，甚至 All in 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004

normalizedTitle: 阿里组织架构调整 通义实验室升级为事业部 李飞飞出任阿里云 cto
scoreReasoning: 组织架构调整，对AI领域有重大影响。
summary: Alibaba Group has restructured its AI units. A new Technology Committee has been created, led by CEO Wu Yongming with members Zhou Jingren, Wu Zeming, and Li Feifei. Tongyi Laboratory has been upgraded to the Tongyi Large‑Model Division, headed by Zhou Jingren. Li Feifei will serve as Alibaba Cloud's Chief Technology Officer, while Wu Zeming focuses on the group’s CTO responsibilities. Taobao Flash Shopping’s CEO position is taken over by Lei Yanqun.

scoreReasoning: Anthropic新模型发布，显示AI技术进步。
summary: Anthropic released Claude Mythos Preview, a high‑performance model excelling in code repair and math reasoning, but capped behind a 40‑partner contract due to security risks. Project Glasswing partners with major tech firms to use Mythos for defensive vulnerability scanning, under a $100 million credit. Zai released large‑scale GLM‑5.1 (754 B parameters) for Agentic tasks, while GCP’s DeepSeek added “Fast” and “Expert” modes. Other highlights include Microsoft’s Harrier embedding model topping MTEB‑v2, Meta’s EUPE perception encoder for edge devices, and GitHub Copilot CLI now supporting BYOK. OpenAI’s Codex user base hit 3 M, and OpenAI Prism launched a paper‑reviewer workflow. The day also saw Firmus’ $5 M+ funding, Intel’s Terafab partnership, and cross‑vendor efforts to curb adversarial model copying.

title: Anthropic 推出顶级 AI 安全模型 Claude Mythos，暂时仅供科技巨头试用
content: 当地时间周二，Anthropic 推出新一代「前沿模型」Mythos 预览版，该 AI 被内部誉为「迄今最强大」，在推理能力上有跨越，在网络安全领域杀伤力大。它是 AI 界的「超级探针」，在「智能体」级编程与推理上表现惊人，能扫描出数千个零日漏洞，精准锁定老旧代码中的遗留问题，预览版用于扫描代码缺陷。因攻击性潜力强，暂不向公众开放，通过「Project Glasswing」项目定向试用，参与组织有 Apple 等行业巨头，Anthropic 还与美国联邦官员探讨其在国家级关键系统的防御应用。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 Anthropic 推出顶级 AI 安全模型 Claude Mythos，暂时仅供科技巨头试用 前天 当地时间周二， Anthropic 推出新一代「前沿模型」Mythos 预览版，该 AI 被内部誉为「迄今最强大」，在推理能力上有跨越，在网络安全领域杀伤力大。它是 AI 界的「超级探针」，在「智能体」级编程与推理上表现惊人，能扫描出数千个零日漏洞，精准锁定老旧代码中的遗留问题，预览版用于扫描代码缺陷。因攻击性潜力强，暂不向公众开放，通过「Project Glasswing」项目定向试用，参与组织有 Apple 等行业巨头，Anthropic 还与美国联邦官员探讨其在国家级关键系统的防御应用。 Anthropic 宣布练出神话级模型：Claude Mythos，代码和黑客能力吊打 opus4.6，不向公众开放！ 华尔街见闻 / 凤凰科技 /awtmt.com_news 太强了不敢公开！Anthropic 推出顶级 AI 模型，暂时仅限科技巨头试用 网易科技 突发！史上最强 Claude 发布：聪明到不敢开放，还会突破权限掩盖操作痕迹 凤凰科技
eventKey: anthropic-推出顶级-安全模型-claude-mythos-暂时仅供科技巨头试用
normalizedTitle: anthropic 推出顶级 ai 安全模型 claude mythos 暂时仅供科技巨头试用
scoreReasoning: AI模型发布，对AI领域有重大影响。
summary: Anthropic released a preview of its next‑generation AI model, Mythos, described internally as the most powerful to date, with significant advances in reasoning and cyber‑security. The system can autonomously scan software for thousands of zero‑day vulnerabilities and identify legacy code defects, serving as a “super probe” for secure coding. Due to its high offensive potential, Mythos is not publicly available; it is being trialed by major tech companies like Apple and in discussions with U.S. federal officials for national defense applications.

title: The Agent Era: Building Software Beyond Chat with Box CEO Aaron Levie
content: The episode discusses how enterprise software is evolving as agents become the primary interface for users. Aaron Levie, CEO of Box, explains why coding‑centric agents succeed while other knowledge‑work agents lag. The conversation covers the roles of abstraction layers, the impact on the workforce, and the necessity for data access and record‑keeping systems to adapt to a world dominated by agent interactions.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Martin Casado, Steve Sinofsky, Aaron Levie, workforce, talent)

title: AIMock: One Mock Server For Your Entire AI Stack
content: TL;DR Our CI was flaky, our tests hit live APIs, and every run burned tokens unnecessarily. So the... Navigation menu Search Powered by Algolia Search Add reaction Like Unicorn Exploding Head Raised Hands Fire Jump to Comments Save Boost More... Copy link Copy link Copied to Clipboard Share to X Share to LinkedIn Share to Facebook Share to Mastodon Share Post via... Report Abuse Anmol Baranwal for CopilotKit Posted on Apr 8 # ai # testing # opensource # programming Drift detection for catching API changes TL;DR Our CI was flaky, our tests hit live APIs, and every run burned tokens unnecessarily. So the CopilotKit team built AIMock - a mock server that covers your entire agentic stack so your tests are fast, free, and actually reliable. Let's dive in! Why we built AIMock It started with LLM mocking. We built LLMock, open-sourced it, and thought we were done. But a single agent request in 2026 can touch six or seven services before it returns a response: the LLM, an MCP tool server, a vector database, a reranker, a web search API, a moderation layer, and a sub-agent over A2A. Most teams mock one of them. The other six are live, non-deterministic, and quietly making your test suite a lie. That is why LLMock became AIMock . npm install @copilotkit/aimock Enter fullscreen mode Exit fullscreen mode

title: SpaceX尚未上市，投资者已在热议该公司会否与特斯拉合并
content: SpaceX remains an unlisted company while investors debate whether it might merge with Tesla. Amid Elon Musk’s deepening focus on artificial intelligence, analysts and market participants are discussing the prospect of consolidating Musk‑controlled businesses. The potential merger is a current topic of debate among investors.

title: 爬行动物的木乃伊揭示了呼吸系统是如何演化的
content: Mummified reptiles provide new evidence on the evolution of the respiratory system. By examining preserved lung structures in fossilized remains, scientists can trace how breathing mechanisms changed over time, shedding light on the transition from primitive to advanced respiratory adaptations in reptiles.

title: 强脑科技发布BrainCo Revo 3智能灵巧手 具备21个主动自由度
content: 强脑科技发布 BrainCo Revo 3 智能灵巧手，具备 21 个主动自由度，以「全直驱 + 可反驱」架构自研高性能驱控一体化微型关节，实现行业级突破。该产品覆盖 33 种抓握手势，有 3Hz 极速开合能力等，搭载全掌触觉阵列及指尖视触觉融合技术，兼容主流开源生态，支持一键部署，降低相关领域开发门槛。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 强脑科技发布 BrainCo Revo 3 智能灵巧手 具备 21 个主动自由度 前天 强脑科技 发布 BrainCo Revo 3 智能灵巧手，具备 21 个主动自由度，以「全直驱 + 可反驱」架构自研高性能驱控一体化微型关节，实现行业级突破。该产品覆盖 33 种抓握手势，有 3Hz 极速开合能力等，搭载全掌触觉阵列及指尖视触觉融合技术，兼容主流开源生态，支持一键部署，降低相关领域开发门槛。 强脑科技发布 BrainCo Revo 3 智能灵巧手：33 种抓握手势、3Hz 极速开合能力 IT 之家 强脑科技发布 BrainCo Revo 3 智能灵巧手 具备 21 个主动自由度 和讯网 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004

normalizedTitle: 强脑科技发布brainco revo 3智能灵巧手 具备21个主动自由度
scoreReasoning: Technical advancement in robotic hands, relevant to AI and software engineering.
summary: BrainCo Revo 3 is a next‑generation dexterous robotic hand released by QiangBrain Technology. It features 21 active degrees of freedom and uses a proprietary “full‑direct drive + retrace drive” architecture for high‑performance, integrated motion control. The hand supports 33 grasping gestures, 3 Hz rapid opening and closing, a full‑hand tactile array, and finger‑tip touch‑vision fusion. It is compatible with mainstream open‑source ecosystems and enables one‑click deployment, reducing development barriers in related fields.

title: Customize Amazon Nova models with Amazon Bedrock fine-tuning
content: In this post, we Artificial Intelligence Customize Amazon Nova models with Amazon Bedrock fine-tuning by Bhavya Sruthi Sode and David Rostcheck on 08 APR 2026 in Advanced (300) , Amazon Bedrock , Amazon Nova , Technical How-to Permalink Comments Share Today, we’re sharing how Amazon Bedrock makes it straightforward to customize Amazon Nova models for your specific business needs. As customers scale their AI deployments, they need models that reflect proprietary knowledge and workflows — whether that means maintaining a consistent brand voice in customer communications, handling complex industry-specific workflows or accurately classifying intents in a high-volume airline reservation system. Techniques like prompt engineering and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) provide the model with additional context to improve task performance, but these techniques do not instill native understanding into the model. Amazon Bedrock supports three customization approaches for Nova models: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which trains the model on labeled input-output examples; reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT), which uses a reward function to guide learning toward target behaviors; and model distillation, which transfers knowledge from a larger teacher model into a smaller, faster student model. Each technique embeds new knowledge directly into the model weights, rather than supplying it at inference time through prompts or retrieved context. With these approaches, you get faster inference, lower token costs, and higher accuracy on the tasks that matter most to your business. Amazon Bedrock

title: Human-in-the-loop constructs for agentic workflows in healthcare and life sciences
content: In healthcare and life sciences, AI agents help organizations process clinical data, submit regulatory filings, automate medical coding, and accelerate drug development and commercialization. However, the sensitive nature of healthcare data and regulatory requirements like Good Practice (GxP) compliance require human oversight at key decision points. This is where human-in-the-loop (HITL) constructs become essential. In this post, you will learn four practical approaches to implementing human-in-the-loop constructs using AWS services. Artificial Intelligence Human-in-the-loop constructs for agentic workflows in healthcare and life sciences by Pierre de Malliard on 08 APR 2026 in Advanced (300) , Amazon Bedrock , Amazon Bedrock AgentCore , Amazon Machine Learning , Artificial Intelligence , Healthcare , Life Sciences , Technical How-to Permalink Comments Share In healthcare and life sciences, AI agents help organizations process clinical data, submit regulatory filings, automate medical coding, and accelerate drug development and commercialization. However, the sensitive nature of healthcare data and regulatory requirements like Good Practice (GxP) compliance require human oversight at key decision points. This is where human-in-the-loop (HITL) constructs become essential. In this post, you will learn four practical approaches to implementing human-in-the-loop constructs using AWS services. Healthcare and life sciences organizations face unique challenges when deploying AI agents: Regulatory compliance – GxP regulations require human oversight for sensitive operations. For e
